title: High Design Character Relationship Diagram Poster AI
sourceTitle: High Design Character Relationship Diagram Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-design character relationship diagram poster for fictional cyberpunk detective crew relationship map with five original characters, anchored by CITY CREW / allies, rivals, secrets. Subject: fictional cyberpunk detective crew relationship map with five original characters defines the cast, faction, or story world shown as portrait nodes, role cards, conflict points, and readable relationship structure. Scene: dark neon editorial diagram, colored connection lines, portrait nodes and short readable labels sets the visual language of the relationship board, including background texture, node style, connection-line logic, labels, and editorial atmosphere. Composition: Fixed premium diagram poster layout: central conflict or lead node, surrounding character portrait nodes, colored relationship lines, role tags, small symbolic icons, short lore fragments, and a clear hierarchy that reads as both a poster and a story map. Signature Elements: Portrait nodes, colored connection lines, role tags, central conflict node, timeline fragments, symbolic icons, short lore labels, and premium poster-grade relationship mapping. Style: High-design editorial relationship diagram with cinematic poster polish, clean information design, strong graphic hierarchy, refined node spacing, tasteful texture, and premium character-world presentation. Color Palette: Palette follows the story theme while keeping high contrast: dark neon or parchment neutrals, sharp line colors, readable label blocks, restrained accent marks, and coherent poster-wide color rhythm. Lighting: Portrait nodes use consistent cinematic lighting or illustrated shading, while the diagram background stays clean enough for labels and relationship lines to remain readable. Typography: CITY CREW / allies, rivals, secrets appears as the main title, faction labels, relationship tags, and short role callouts; text must be concise, legible, and integrated into the diagram grid. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
